label: BLJ_label
reason: The sequence opens with the camera whipping past a brick wall before Mario even appears, then Mario suddenly pops into view and streaks backward across the grated platform at a speed far beyond normal movement. His posture alternates between the long-jump pose and quick ground contacts while moving in the backward direction, matching the visual cues from the BLJ example. This occurs in a regular stage area (not the castle lobby stairs or a star door), so it is the base BLJ rather than LBLJ, SBLJ, or a specific application.
